summary: Tested PET_OS_BEHAVIOR_BIBLE v1.1 Phase 1 (Layer Manager) and Phase 2 (Chat Continuity + Draft Persistence). Golden Flow 1 (tab navigation) and most of Golden Flow 3 (draft persistence) working. Found 2 minor issues.

ui_bugs.issue: Tab navigation requires force=True click due to full-screen overlay (fixed inset-0 z-[100]) intercepting pointer events
ui_bugs.workaround: Using force=True on clicks works, but UX not ideal

integration_issues.issue: Pet switch banner (data-testid='pet-switch-banner') not appearing when switching pets with existing draft. useDraft hook's pet switch detection may not be triggering correctly.

golden_flow_1_tab_navigation.details: Tab switch works: PICKS → SERVICES → TODAY → CHAT_HOME. Layer Manager logs confirm: [LayerManager] Tab switch: CHAT_HOME → PICKS, etc.

tab_switching_closes_previous.details: Clicking a new tab closes the previous panel. Confirmed via Layer Manager state management.

draft_persistence_localstorage.details: Drafts saved to localStorage with 30-min TTL. Key: 'mira_drafts', Format: {petId: {text, expiresAt, petName, updatedAt}}

draft_cleared_on_send.details: Console confirms: [useDraft] Cleared draft for pet: Lola. localStorage.getItem('mira_drafts') returns {} after send.

esc_key_closes_layer.details: ESC key correctly closes topmost layer. Console: [LayerManager] Back: closed primary LEARN, returning to CHAT_HOME

pet_switch_with_draft_banner.details: Pet selector dropdown works and shows all 7 pets with soul scores. However, pet switch banner does not appear when switching pets. The banner element exists in DOM (petSwitchBanner state in useDraft) but visibility condition not met.

chat_scroll_preservation.details: useChatContinuity hook implemented but not fully wired to chat container. Scroll position preservation on layer navigation not tested.

action_items: MEDIUM: Pet switch banner not appearing - investigate useDraft.js pet switch detection logic (lines 135-188). The prevPetIdRef comparison may need adjustment.
LOW: Consider adding pointer-events: none to panel overlay areas that should allow tab clicks to pass through, or ensure tabs have higher z-index than panel overlays.
critical_code_review_comments: LayerContext.jsx - Well-implemented Layer Manager with proper stack management, tab switching, and commit actions
useDraft.js - Draft persistence with localStorage working, but pet switch banner logic may have timing issue with prevPetIdRef
MiraDemoPage.jsx - handleOSTabChange correctly bridges Layer Manager with legacy panel state
useLayerNavigation.js - ESC key handler properly attached and functional
seed_data_creation: Sent test message 'Hello Mira' which created ticket TCK-2026-248430
context_for_next_testing_agent: Layer Manager (Phase 1) and Draft Persistence (Phase 2) are implemented. Tab navigation, ESC key, and draft storage all work. Pet switch banner needs investigation - the useDraft hook's pet switch detection in useEffect at line 135 may not be firing correctly. The petSwitchBanner state exists but never gets set during pet switches.

console_log_evidence.layer_manager: [LayerManager] Tab switch: CHAT_HOME → PICKS, [LayerManager] Back: closed primary LEARN, returning to CHAT_HOME
console_log_evidence.draft_persistence: [useDraft] Loaded draft for pet: Lola - Text: Testing draft persistence feat, [useDraft] Cleared draft for pet: Lola
console_log_evidence.pet_selector: [PetSelector] Pet: Lola soulScore: 63, [PetSelector] Pet: Mystique soulScore: 72, etc. (7 pets total)
